# Preface {.unnumbered}

::: {.callout-note}
This is the companion website for the article "How to conduct online behavioral experiments" by Matthew Warburton and Jonathan Tsay. 
If you have found this resource helpful for designing and implementing your online experiment, please consider citing it in your research:

`Placeholder reference for final publication.`
:::

This resource provides an overview tips and tricks to maximize the benefits of conduting online behavioral research.
